name: Orb of Sweet Demise
description: Notes Due to the small stasis radius, this orb is suited for disabling a single target or a dense group of enemies. The nature of this item generally allows for a faster paced playstyle since the comparatively short stasis duration is just enough to properly position and optionally switch orbs for further self-buffing or enemy debuffing.
effects: On enemies: Stasis and Slowed Stasis Radius: 3 tiles Stasis Duration: 3 seconds Slowed Radius: 2 (+0.1 per WIS over 50) tiles Slowed Duration: 3.5 (+1 per 10 WIS over 50) seconds
